title: capsicum annuum var. conicum
intro: Capsicum annuum var. conicum, also known as the cherry pepper or Italian sweet pepper, is a variety of the Capsicum annuum plant, a type of sweet pepper. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Capsicum annuum var. conicum include reducing pain and inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include dried peppers, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to relieve symptoms of various health conditions.
